paragraphs: I am a freelance engineer based in Matsumoto. From website production to business tooling, I focus on implementations that balance usability and maintainability.

I work mainly with Next.js and TypeScript—frontend implementation that respects design, information architecture, and structures that are easy to operate. I can also cover backend and infrastructure when needed.
The profile images in this section are playful variations inspired by franchises I enjoy. A random image appears on each visit, and you can switch to another with the button.
